backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a high-confidence request to add a new educational site card to the Games page, with details on affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short descriptions summarizing each component's purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens and base styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app that loads Puter.js, CodeMirror, and Google CSE scripts, and mounts the React root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page navigation, tab state via useTabs, and a panic overlay mode triggered by button or keyboard shortcut.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor sub-tab using CodeMirror with support for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python, featuring run/preview, save to localStorage, and reset functionality.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Presentation builder sub-tab with slide list management, per-slide title/body/color editing, and a fullscreen presentation mode with keyboard navigation.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with persistent localStorage state.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated circular loading spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label.
frontend/src/components/common/ProxyInfo: An expandable info panel that displays proxy configuration details (e.g., CORS proxy routes) with collapsible sections, rendered as an overlay below the header.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: The top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, app name, a SECURE status badge, and a panic button with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A vertical sidebar navigation component with links to the five main pages (Home, Games, AI, Code, Quick Open) and keyboard shortcut hints at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with close buttons and a new-tab button, supporting active tab highlighting and overflow scrolling.
Renders the content area for a single browser tab, showing a welcome screen, an error state with retry/open-in-new-window options, or a proxied iframe for the loaded URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic React hook that synchronizes a state value with localStorage, supporting functional updates and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: Manages browser-like tab state (open, close, navigate, proxy fallback chain) persisted to localStorage, with utilities for URL normalization, proxy URL generation, and TikTok embed detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/violet theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base layers, glassmorphism utilities, animated gradient backgrounds, and custom scrollbar and CodeMirror styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI homework assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to the Puter.js AI API, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists a history of Q&A pairs to localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: Page component that renders three sub-tabs—Code Editor, Presentation Builder, and Website Builder—switching between their respective tab components via local state.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: Renders a grid of educational/unblocked game site cards (Math Playground, Scratch, Khan Academy, etc.) with icons and colors, each opening the site URL via the onOpenUrl proxy callback.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: Implements the main browser-like page with an address bar, back/forward/refresh controls, proxy info panel, and an iframe that loads URLs through a CORS proxy, handling navigation and error states.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: Displays a grid of quick-access cards for popular sites (TikTok, YouTube, ChatGPT, etc.) with branded icons and gradients, each opening the site in a new proxy tab via onOpenUrl.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (amethyst, violet, magenta), JetBrains Mono/Rajdhani fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project's current state (version 13) for Cheetah 1.0, documenting architecture decisions, existing features, known issues, and a summary of the single-page proxy browser app built with React.
